---
title: CHAOSS and Augur at CZI EOSS meeting
author:
  - CHAOSS Community
type: post
date: 2020-12-17T15:55:04+00:00
excerpt: 'One of the things that we are exploring in the CHAOSS project is how our open source community health efforts can prove useful in Scientific Software communities. Sean and I had a chance to present our work at the [Chan Zuckerberg Initiative Essential Open Source Software for Science](https://chanzuckerberg.com/eoss/) meeting on December 9th, 2020.'
url: /chaoss-and-augur-at-czi-eoss-meeting/
